news.title: DOSILICON Launches 512Mb High-Performance SPI NOR Flash for 5G Applications
news.summary: DOSILICON introduces DS25X512E 512Mb SPI NOR Flash with 133MHz Quad SPI interface, targeting 5G base stations and high-performance embedded systems.
contentParagraphs: DOSILICON Semiconductor has announced the launch of its highest-density SPI NOR Flash product, the DS25X512E 512Mb (64MB) device. This new product is designed to meet the growing storage demands of 5G base stations, high-performance embedded systems, and complex networking equipment.

The DS25X512E features a high-speed Quad SPI interface supporting clock rates up to 133MHz, delivering effective read bandwidth of 532Mbps. This performance level enables fast firmware loading and efficient execute-in-place (XIP) operation for high-performance processors used in 5G infrastructure.

Key features include advanced security features with hardware write protection, 100,000 program/erase cycle endurance, and 20-year data retention. The device is available in industrial temperature grade (-40°C to +85°C) for harsh environment operation. The DS25X512E is sampling now with mass production scheduled for Q1 2025.

LiTong, as an authorized DOSILICON distributor, provides technical support, evaluation samples, and reference designs for the DS25X512E. Contact our FAE team for application guidance and pricing information.
highlights: 512Mb highest-density SPI NOR Flash in DOSILICON portfolio
Optimized for 5G base stations and high-performance systems
Industrial temperature range for harsh environments
Advanced security features for code protection

seo.title: DOSILICON 512Mb SPI NOR Flash Launch | 5G Applications | LiTong
seo.description: DOSILICON launches DS25X512E 512Mb high-performance SPI NOR Flash for 5G base stations and high-performance embedded systems.

news.title: DOSILICON Expands Automotive Portfolio with AEC-Q100 Grade 0 Products
news.summary: New AEC-Q100 Grade 0 (-40°C to +150°C) qualified memory products target under-hood automotive applications including powertrain and chassis systems.
contentParagraphs: DOSILICON Semiconductor announced the expansion of its automotive memory portfolio with new AEC-Q100 Grade 0 qualified products. These devices are qualified for the most demanding automotive applications with operating temperatures from -40°C to +150°C.

The new Grade 0 products include the DSA25Q32G0 32Mb SPI NOR Flash and DSA35Q02G0 2Gb SPI NAND Flash. These devices target under-hood applications such as engine control units (ECUs), transmission control, electric power steering, and braking systems where extreme temperature operation is required.

AEC-Q100 Grade 0 qualification includes extensive reliability testing: 1000 hours high-temperature operating life at 150°C, 1000 temperature cycles from -40°C to +150°C, and comprehensive ESD and latch-up testing. Full PPAP documentation is available for automotive customers.

LiTong provides complete technical support for automotive qualification including PPAP documentation, long-term supply agreements, and application engineering support. Contact us for automotive product selection and qualification assistance.
highlights: Products include 32Mb NOR and 2Gb NAND Flash

seo.title: DOSILICON AEC-Q100 Grade 0 Automotive Memory | LiTong
seo.description: DOSILICON expands automotive portfolio with AEC-Q100 Grade 0 qualified memory products for under-hood applications.

news.title: DOSILICON Expands MCP Portfolio with New Multi-Chip Package Solutions
news.summary: New MCP configurations including 64Mb NOR + 4Gb NAND and dual NOR options provide flexible integrated memory solutions for space-constrained designs.
contentParagraphs: DOSILICON Semiconductor has expanded its Multi-Chip Package (MCP) portfolio with new configurations designed to address diverse application requirements. The new MCP products integrate multiple memory dies in compact packages, providing complete memory subsystems for space-constrained designs.

The expanded MCP lineup includes: DSMCP64N4G (64Mb NOR + 4Gb NAND) for high-end applications requiring both large boot storage and extensive data storage; DSMCP32N2G (32Mb NOR + 2Gb NAND) for mid-range applications; and DSMCP64N64 (64Mb + 64Mb dual NOR) for applications requiring very large code storage.

All MCP products use industry-standard WSON-8 packages measuring 8x6mm or smaller, providing significant PCB space savings compared to discrete solutions. The integrated approach reduces component count, simplifies assembly, and improves reliability by eliminating external interconnections.

These new MCP products are ideal for smartphones, wearables, IoT devices, and portable electronics where board space is at a premium. LiTong provides comprehensive MCP design support including reference designs and application guidance.
highlights: 50-70% PCB space savings vs discrete solutions
Ideal for smartphones, wearables, and IoT

seo.title: DOSILICON MCP Portfolio Expansion | Multi-Chip Packages | LiTong
seo.description: DOSILICON expands MCP portfolio with new multi-chip package solutions for space-constrained designs.

news.title: DOSILICON Opens New Design Center in Shanghai Zhangjiang Hi-Tech Park
news.summary: New Shanghai design center strengthens R&D capabilities with focus on next-generation memory technologies and automotive products.
contentParagraphs: DOSILICON Semiconductor has officially opened its new design center in Shanghai's Zhangjiang Hi-Tech Park, significantly expanding the company's research and development capabilities. The new facility represents a major investment in next-generation memory technology development.

The expanded design center features state-of-the-art laboratories for memory design, characterization, and validation. Key focus areas include: next-generation high-density SPI NOR Flash, advanced SPI NAND Flash with enhanced reliability, automotive-grade memory products, and innovative MCP solutions.

The Shanghai team will work on developing memory products with densities up to 1Gb for NOR Flash and 16Gb for NAND Flash, targeting emerging applications in 5G, AI, and autonomous driving. The facility also includes an automotive qualification lab for AEC-Q100 testing.

DOSILICON plans to launch 20 new products in 2025, including high-density NOR Flash, advanced NAND Flash with enhanced ECC, and new MCP configurations. The company is actively recruiting analog and digital IC design engineers, validation engineers, and application engineers.
LiTong, as an authorized DOSILICON distributor, will work closely with the new design center to provide customers with early access to new products and comprehensive technical support.
highlights: New design center in Shanghai Zhangjiang Hi-Tech Park
Automotive qualification lab for AEC-Q100 testing
